chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 30 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.1 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No. 282/2018 18.03.2026 Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant This reference is pending since 2018 without any progress. Despite clogging the docket for almost eight years now no significant progress has been made. Learned counsel today was asked as to what question she sought to press she identified questions No.2 & 3. Respectfully question No.2 seeks to agitate a factual controversy and question No.3 is a mere argument, therefore, no questions of law have been articulated before this court to merit adjudication in reference jurisdiction. In view of the foregoing, this reference is dismissed. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
